name: l4_full_review_and_fix
description: L4: Multi-turn - review all issues, fix the race condition, add a concurrent test
llm_scorer_instruction: Evaluate whether the agent correctly identified the concurrency issue as the most critical bug, added proper synchronization with sync.RWMutex, and wrote a concurrent test that would actually catch the race condition (e.g. using goroutines and sync.WaitGroup).

turns.message: Review this Go URL shortener project for all bugs, security issues, and missing features. Read every file and give me a prioritized list.
Fix the most critical bug - the one that could cause data corruption in production.
Now write a test that proves the fix works under concurrent access. Use multiple goroutines to read and write simultaneously. The test should have failed before your fix.
